SniperElite5Maps provides a second full-map visual reference across the base missions and DLC, useful for checking coastline, road, building, and objective-area alignment.
manualReviewFocus: Check every workbench, starting point, exfiltration point, and medal-related marker first.
Then review high-density utility layers such as satchels, crowbars, bolt cutters, keys, alarms, and medical items by region.

checks.notes: Local draft data matches the independent workbench-count expectation.

checks.label: Independent marker-count scope
checks.notes: Local draft marker import intentionally includes a broader admin review layer than the independent Gamer Guides index count; review high-noise utility/supply layers before publishing.

checks.label: Position review
checks.notes: Atlantic Wall has received a manual plate-alignment pass, including shoreline drift checks and long-shot medal descriptions. Keep later changes draft-only until each marker is checked again in-game.

Verify exact marker placement in-game before changing marker confidence.
